## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of the change. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New Skill (`skills/<skill-name>/`)
- [ ] Change to existing Skill
- [ ] Tooling / scripts / CI
- [ ] Docs / references
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/validate.sh` locally and it passed.
- [ ] (If a new Skill) I read `docs/SKILL-AUTHORING-GUIDE.md` and my `SKILL.md` follows the frontmatter spec.
- [ ] (If a new Skill) `name` is kebab-case, ≤ 64 chars, and matches the directory name.
- [ ] (If a new Skill) `description` is 150–300 chars and states both **when** and **what**.
- [ ] No absolute paths, secrets, or user-/machine-specific identifiers are hardcoded.
- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/generate-index.sh` if the Skill set changed.
- [ ] Docs and the changelog are updated as needed.
